cards.front: What two contexts are considered for digital system benefits/drawbacks?
cards.back: Office-based systems for organisations and consumer systems for individuals.

cards.back: Business to Business Electronic Data Interchange.

cards.front: Name one online marketplace sales type.

cards.back: Email/social media marketing, website advertising, data mining and analytics.
